data.body: AC1 CONFIRMED (2026-07-17T04:06:23Z): the verify-identity CI workflow (verify-identity.yaml) PASSED on the flip change's sha (cb0f8ec3b) with require_authenticated=true + enforce_since=8dcef776c3dd9e68935b74b82137e1ffd8f04f10 — i.e. 'verify-identity --all --require-authenticated --since <anchor>' exits 0 over the whole store: every pre-boundary event grandfathered, every enforced post-boundary event verified. AC2 (regression test test_identity_enforce_since_grandfather.py) landed on main (817aaa84c, Verified+1) + has teeth. AC3 anchor 8dcef776 (an existing gate-exempt tickets-branch marker) recorded above; 8d91 did not modify rebar.toml (only the test file). Closing.
